project.name: CTO Platform Improvements
project.description: Multi-phase improvements to the CTO platform based on implementation plan analysis. Includes intake fixes, fresh start mechanism, subagent wiring, and linear task sync.

stories.title: Remove local=true from MCP intake tool
stories.description: Remove the `local=true` option from the MCP intake tool to prevent confusion during E2E tests. Intake should ALWAYS run in a container, never locally.
acceptance_criteria: Delete `handle_intake_local()` function from `crates/notify/mcp/src/main.rs`
Remove local handling block from main intake handler
Remove `local` parameter from tool schema in `crates/notify/mcp/src/tools.rs`
Update AGENTS.md documentation to clarify intake never runs locally
All existing intake tests pass
MCP tool schema no longer includes local option

stories.title: Remove hardcoded Task 1 = Bolt enforcement
stories.description: Remove the hardcoded assumption that Task 1 must always be Bolt (infrastructure). Simple projects may not need infrastructure setup. Task 1 should be routed based on content like all other tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Delete the Task 1 = bolt forcing block in `crates/intake/src/bin/cli.rs` (lines ~1145-1160)
Task 1 now routes through `infer_agent_hint_with_deps_str()` like all other tasks
Existing routing tests pass
New test: Task 1 with implementation content routes to Rex/Blaze
New test: Task 1 with infrastructure content still routes to Bolt

stories.title: Add optional auto-append deploy task
stories.description: Optionally auto-append a final deployment task when configured. Should be controlled by `defaults.intake.autoAppendDeployTask` in cto-config.json. Only applies to deployable projects (web apps, APIs), not libraries.
acceptance_criteria: Add `autoAppendDeployTask` field to IntakeDefaults in `crates/config/src/types.rs`
Implement auto-append logic in `crates/intake/src/bin/cli.rs`
Deploy task depends on all other tasks
Deploy task has agent_hint = bolt
Test: When enabled, deploy task is appended
Test: When disabled (default), no deploy task added
Test: If deploy task already exists in PRD, don't duplicate

stories.title: Wire up Fresh Start threshold config
stories.description: Wire up the `freshStartThreshold` config value from cto-config.json through to the retry-loop.sh.hbs template. The template code already exists but the variable is never populated.
acceptance_criteria: Add `fresh_start_threshold` field to PlayDefaults in `crates/config/src/types.rs`
Pass `fresh_start_threshold` to template context in healer prompt generation
Template renders with actual threshold value (not hardcoded)
Test: Config with freshStartThreshold=5 renders correctly
Test: Default value (3) used when not specified
Fresh start triggers after configured number of retries

stories.title: Update SubagentConfig.should_use() for OpenCode
stories.description: Update the `should_use()` method in SubagentConfig to also return true for OpenCode CLI, not just Claude. OpenCode has native subagent support via `mode: subagent` config.
acceptance_criteria: Update `should_use()` in `crates/config/src/types.rs` to match claude OR opencode
Test: should_use('claude') returns true when enabled
Test: should_use('opencode') returns true when enabled
Test: should_use('codex') returns false (not supported)
Test: should_use returns false when disabled regardless of CLI

stories.title: Pass subagent config to template context
stories.description: Pass the `subagents` config from AgentConfig to the Handlebars template context so coordinator templates can conditionally render subagent dispatch instructions.
acceptance_criteria: Add subagents to enriched CLI config in `enrich_cli_config_from_agent()`
Template context includes `subagents.enabled` and `subagents.maxConcurrent`
Test: Coordinator template renders dispatch instructions when enabled
Test: Coordinator template skips dispatch when disabled
Existing template tests pass

stories.title: Add subtasks field to CodeRunSpec
stories.description: Add a `subtasks` field to CodeRunSpec CRD so subtasks from intake can be passed through to the agent container and rendered in templates.
acceptance_criteria: Add `SubtaskSpec` struct to `crates/controller/src/crds/coderun.rs`
Add `subtasks: Option<Vec<SubtaskSpec>>` to CodeRunSpec
SubtaskSpec includes: id, title, description, subagent_type, execution_level, parallelizable, dependencies
CRD schema validates correctly
Test: CodeRun with subtasks serializes/deserializes correctly

stories.title: Pass subtasks array to template context
stories.description: Pass the subtasks array from CodeRunSpec to the Handlebars template context. Templates can then iterate over subtasks to generate dispatch instructions.
acceptance_criteria: Template context includes `subtasks` array from code_run.spec.subtasks
Each subtask has all fields accessible in templates
Test: Template with {{#each subtasks}} renders correctly
Test: Empty subtasks array doesn't break templates

stories.title: Register group_by Handlebars helper
stories.description: Register a `group_by` Handlebars helper that groups array items by a field. This is used by subagent-dispatch.md.hbs to group subtasks by execution_level for parallel dispatch.
acceptance_criteria: Register `group_by` helper in `register_template_helpers()`
Helper accepts array and field name: {{#each (group_by subtasks 'execution_level')}}
Returns object keyed by field value with arrays of items
Test: group_by with execution_level groups correctly
Test: group_by with missing field handles gracefully
subagent-dispatch.md.hbs renders correctly with grouped subtasks

stories.title: Implement intake update command
stories.description: Implement `intake update` command that re-parses PRD/architecture changes and generates a delta PR with updated task files. This allows mid-flight updates to the workflow.
acceptance_criteria: New command: `intake update --project-name <name> [--prd-content <content>] [--architecture-content <content>]`
Loads existing tasks.json from docs repo
Re-runs task generation with updated inputs
Computes diff between old and new tasks
Generates delta PR with only changed task files
Preserves task IDs where possible (matching by title similarity)
Test: Update with new PRD generates correct delta
Test: Update preserves completed task status

stories.title: Implement intake sync-task command
stories.description: Implement `intake sync-task` command that pulls task changes from Linear issue edits and updates the corresponding task files in the docs repo.
acceptance_criteria: New command: `intake sync-task --issue-id <id> --project-name <name> --task-id <id>`
Fetches issue details from Linear API
Parses description into prompt content and acceptance criteria
Updates task prompt.md and acceptance.md files
Creates PR with updated task files
Test: Sync from edited Linear issue updates task correctly
Test: Acceptance criteria checkboxes parsed correctly

stories.title: Add MCP tools for intake update and sync
stories.description: Add MCP tools `intake_update` and `intake_sync_task` so these commands can be invoked from the CTO MCP server during play workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Add `intake_update` tool to MCP tools schema
Add `intake_sync_task` tool to MCP tools schema
Implement handlers in `crates/notify/mcp/src/main.rs`
Tools call the intake binary with appropriate arguments
Test: MCP tool invocation works correctly
Documentation updated with new tool descriptions

0.name: Intake Clarifications
0.description: Critical fixes to remove confusion and ensure proper task routing

1.name: Fresh Start Wiring
1.description: Wire up the Fresh Start mechanism config to templates

1.5.name: Subagent Wiring
1.5.description: Wire up subagent config and subtasks to template context

2.name: Linear Task Sync
2.description: Enable mid-flight task updates from PRD changes or Linear edits
